interaction: Desktop/Web completed-work disclosure, live-thinking status, composer reasoning control, spinner, transcript action, and sidebar status repair
sourceSurface: Desktop renderer development playground backed by freshly compiled workspace packages
limitations: The final recording is the frontend-only Desktop renderer, not packaged Desktop.
The authenticated real-product surface was also validated with profile ui-icon-optical-sizing on renderer port 39101 before the proof capture.
The local preview is ephemeral and is stopped after capture; the committed MP4 is the durable exact-tree proof.
